[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000111 3
1 1011010 4
2 0010100 2
3 0001110 3
4 0010100 2
5 0000000 a
6 0111011 5
7 1001111 5

01 10 0001011 3
12 21 0000111 3 match 0
23 32 0000010 1
34 43 0010000 1
45 54 0000100 1
56 65 0000100 1
67 76 0000000 a match 5
70 07 0000000 a match 5

13 31 1001010 3
24 42 0000100 1
35 53 0001010 2
46 64 0010100 2 match 2 4
57 75 0000000 a match 5
60 06 0010000 1
71 17 0000000 a match 5

36 63 0010000 1
47 74 0000000 a match 5
50 05 0001010 2
61 16 0000100 1
72 27 0000000 a match 5

15 51 0001110 3 match 3
26 62 0000100 1
37 73 0000000 a match 5
